CreateDedicatedGateway.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See ClientToken idempotency
CreateDedicatedGateway.name: Name of the dedicated gateway, consisting of letters, digits, and special characters -_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65
CreateDedicatedGateway.vpcId: ID of the VPC to which the dedicated gateway belongs
CreateDedicatedGateway.speed: Bandwidth limit of the dedicated gateway in Mbps, must be an integer between 2 and 10000
CreateDedicatedGateway.description: Description of the dedicated gateway, up to 200 characters
CreateDedicatedGateway.etId: ID of the bound physical dedicated line; etId and channelId must be provided together
CreateDedicatedGateway.channelId: ID of the bound dedicated line channel; etId and channelId must be provided together
CreateDedicatedGateway.localCidrs: Cloud-side network of the dedicated gateway; users may select the VPC CIDR or specify one or more custom CIDRs. Only configurable when etId and channelId are present
CreateDedicatedGateway.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreateDedicatedGateway.tags.tagKey: Tag key, may contain letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 1-65
CreateDedicatedGateway.tags.tagValue: Tag value, may contain letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 0-65
